Package com.example.a3dscannerapp

Class ARCoreVideoCaptureActivity

  • java.lang.Object
    • AppCompatActivity
      • com.example.a3dscannerapp.ARCoreVideoCaptureActivity
  • public class ARCoreVideoCaptureActivity
extends AppCompatActivity
    ARCore activity that let user record the rgb frames, depth frames and depth confidence maps using ARCore
